chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 71 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن المؤمن رؤياه جزء من سبعين جزء من النبوة ومنهم من يعطى على الثلاث .

en.muhajir-b-ali: 71. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: A believer's dream is a part of seventy parts of prophethood. And amongst them are some who have been given one-third.
